intro.title: AviUtl2 Catalog
intro.description: Configure AviUtl2 Catalog for first-time use

installStatus.title: Install Status
installStatus.description: Choose the option that matches your AviUtl2 setup.
installStatus.installedDescription: Use this if AviUtl2 is already installed.
installStatus.freshDescription:
Use this if AviUtl2 isn't installed yet.
The latest version will be downloaded and installed for you.

details.standardDescription: Install plugins and scripts into ProgramData.
details.portableDescription: Install plugins and scripts into the data folder next to aviutl2.exe.

existing.title: Choose Folder
existing.description: Select the folder where AviUtl2 is already installed
existing.label: AviUtl2 Folder Path
existing.hint: Select the folder that contains aviutl2.exe

install.title: Install Location
install.description: Select the folder where AviUtl2 should be installed.
install.label: Install folder

packages.title: Recommended Packages
packages.allInstalled: All recommended packages are already installed
packages.description: Installs the core plugins needed for standard use

done.title: Setup complete!
done.description: All settings have been set, have fun!

errors.installFailed: Package failed to install. (Is AviUtl2 running?)
errors.bulkInstallPartialFailed: Some packages failed to install. (Is AviUtl2 running?)
errors.packageInfoPartialFailed: Could not load some package information: {{ids}}
errors.requiredPackagesLoadFailed: Could not load the required package information.
errors.packageInfoUnavailable: Could not fetch the package information.
errors.finalizeFailed: Failed to complete the initial setup.
